allowlist.descriptionRegex: Function 'process_cancel_task_impl' may be vulnerable to account reinitialization
allowlist.rationale: False positive: instruction does not use init/init_if_needed. It mutates existing PDA accounts validated by seeds/bump and closes claim accounts explicitly.

allowlist.descriptionRegex: Function 'handler' may be vulnerable to account reinitialization
allowlist.rationale: False positive: no account initialization path in handler. Accounts are pre-existing PDAs validated by Anchor account constraints.

allowlist.descriptionRegex: Function '(complete_task_private|decode_private_completion_payload|build_router_verify_ix)' may be vulnerable to account reinitialization
allowlist.rationale: False positive: helper split moved logic into pure validation/CPI-construction functions; no helper introduces init_if_needed or account reinitialization. Spend-tracking accounts still use one-time init seeds and mutable accounts remain PDA-constrained.

allowlist.descriptionRegex: Potential arbitrary CPI detected without program ID validation
allowlist.rationale: False positive: CPI program is hard-pinned via account address constraint, explicit runtime equality checks, strict instruction-shape validation (validate_router_verify_ix), and Instruction.program_id fixed to trusted router id.

allowlist.descriptionRegex: Function 'apply_initiator_slash' may be vulnerable to account reinitialization
allowlist.rationale: False positive: program entrypoint wrapper only delegates to instruction handler; no account init logic exists in wrapper.

allowlist.descriptionRegex: Function 'initialize_protocol' may be vulnerable to account reinitialization
allowlist.rationale: False positive: wrapper forwards to initialize_protocol handler; Anchor account init constraints are implemented in instruction module.

allowlist.descriptionRegex: Function 'initialize_governance' may be vulnerable to account reinitialization
allowlist.rationale: False positive: wrapper forwards to initialize_governance handler; no direct initialization logic in wrapper.

allowlist.descriptionRegex: Function 'create_proposal' may be vulnerable to account reinitialization
allowlist.rationale: False positive: wrapper forwards to create_proposal handler; no account reinitialization surface in wrapper.
